offer: For logistics coordinators processing 10-20 shipments/week, delays in shipment status cause late orders. We provide real-time updates instead of manual tracking through emails and spreadsheets.
problem: Lack of real-time visibility into shipment status
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics coordinators

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
